title: eriogonum foliosum
intro: Eriogonum foliosum, also known as the leafy buckwheat or leafy desert buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is a shrub-like perennial that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum foliosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Eriogonum foliosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
